title: Geeked Patrick Star / Happy Patrick
about: Geeked Patrick Star or the Happy Patrick Meme is a reaction image of a pink creature that many believe resembles the SpongeBob character Patrick Star smiling with its mouth wide open against a background featuring a dolphin, a rainbow and flowers. The meme started spreading on TikTok as early as December 2025 as a reaction image in comment sections, particularly under versions of the " Charlie Charlie Kirky " meme. As a reaction image, the meme is used to represent positive, happy emotions.
origin:
The origin of the reaction image is unclear. It may have originated from the comment section of an unknown TikTok video, where the meme is the most prevalent as of early 2026.

On December 1st, 2025, Instagram [1] user zucoyy posted a low-res version of the image as the final slide in a carousel post showing off their artwork, garnering over 4,700 likes in three months. This is the earliest known user to share the meme, although it is unlikely to be the true origin.

It is purported by some online that the meme began as an image of Patrick Star fed into and reinterpreted by an AI program numerous times, although this is unconfirmed. The possible source image in question shows Patrick with no eyes drooling with his tongue out. The image comes from the episode, "SpongeBob's Big Birthday Blowout."
